title: Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions12.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 12:
The Vactooine Disaster'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[August]] [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0590592696 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[0 ABY/Legends|0–0.5 ABY]]''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' and the next three ''Star Wars Missions'' books tell a continuous story, which depicts the Rebel Alliance still occupying their base on Yavin 4, thus placing it in the first six months of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] before the [[Evacuation of Yavin]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster''''' is the twelfth adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[August]] [[1998]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The planet Vactooine is in grave danger—a squadron of ruthless battle droids is about to attack. The droids are part of a sinister conspiracy to control the galaxy. As a member of the Rebel Alliance, you must protect the innocent planet from certain doom. Your mission: to prevent the Vactooine Disaster!'' ''May the Force be with you.'' ==Plot summary== On [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] inspects the [[Drone barge/Legends|drone barge]] recently delivered to him. His majordomo, [[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]], discovers that the barge once belonged to [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]], a fact which piques Jabba's interest. On [[Boonda's Moon]], [[Groot]] and [[Pelvin]] are rescued by an Imperial relief force, but shortly after their departure, Boonda is contacted by Jabba, who provides the manufacturer with the location of the renegade droid army. Boonda tells Groot of this, who decides to bring Boonda along to Vactooine. The Hutt, however, is reluctant, and finds himself wanting to escape his predicament. On [[Vactooine]], [[12-4C-41]] is preparing to set up his droid foundries, when his master, [[Olag Greck]], meets him, and scolds him for his previous detour at [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Meanwhile, the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]—carrying [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[Q-7N]]—and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] enter the [[Vactooine system/Legends|Vactooine system]], only to be met by Groot's Imperial shuttle. The shuttle disables all the Alliance craft bar one, which pursues the Imperial craft, disabling it. Boonda escapes in one of the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''{{'s}}]] pods. Despite forcing the shuttle to crash, the Rebel too plummets towards Vactooine, and makes a rough landing. Upon landing, the Rebel encounters Boonda, and saves him from several [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. Venturing with Boonda further into the wilderness of Vactooine, the Rebel encounters the downed Imperial shuttle, and captures Groot and Pelvin. After speeding to the [[Vactooine Mining Colony]], the Rebel infiltrates the facility and encounters Olag Greck. Greck panics, and calls in Wuntoo, but the Rebel convinces the traffic controller droid that Greck is manipulating him, and that he is committing acts of evil. The droids are swayed, and rebel against Greck. Wuntoo reveals that the entire revolt was actually Greck's plan, and that he intended to create a gargantuan droid army on Vactooine to overthrow the Empire. The Rebels, satisfied, apprehend Greck, obtain the ''Decimator'', and extend an invitation to join the Rebellion to Boonda. ==Continuity== The [[Kalarba system/Legends|Kalarba system]] is referred to as "Karlarba" in this book. ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster}} {{App |characters= *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic
